## [00:00 - 03:03]

So you can also create custom audiences based on Facebook specific sources. So there's six different types of audiences you can create here, but essentially the idea is that these people are on Facebook and performing certain actions on Facebook. So the six different types of audiences that you can create are based on videos, based on lead forms, based on instant experiences, based on Facebook page activity, based on events, and also based on Instagram business profiles. So we're going to start off with videos here. So just click on videos and then the first prompt you're going to have is choose the engagement level that you that these viewers have. So click down here and you can see you're able to select people who have viewed at least three seconds, people who have viewed at least 10 seconds, and then also you can segment down based on people who have watched 25, 50, 75, and 95 percent of your video. So the thing you want to do here is you want to make sure that you're retargeting those people or you're creating custom audiences of people who are higher intent. So for shorter videos you probably want to look at people who have viewed about 95% of your video, but for videos above the 10 second mark you want to make sure that people have viewed at least 10 seconds of that video. Now it's good a very case by case, but you want to make sure that those people that are watching your videos are very high intent. Now the next step here is you can choose exactly what time frame you want to use. So the nice part about retargeting or creating custom audiences with video views is that you're able to use the last 365 days as opposed to just 180 days with some other custom audiences. So you just need to select exactly what range you want to use and then finally you need to name your audience and then you just click create audience here and you'll create that custom audience based on video engagements. So the next type of custom audience is based on lead form engagement. So if you want to create a custom audience of people who opened or completed a lead form this is where you go. So click on the lead form here and then essentially you can retarget people, anyone who has opened the form, people who opened but didn't submit the form and then also people who opened and submitted the form. So the maximum time for this custom audience is 90 days. So essentially here you can choose anywhere between zero and 90 days and then you select the page that you're using and then you also select the exact form that you're using as well. So if you really want to segment down based on a certain form you can do that as well here. Again the same step you just need to name your audience and then you click create and you're good to go. Now similar here if you want to create a custom audience based on people who have viewed your instant experience you can do that as well. So this is going to be people who have viewed your instant experience on Facebook or on Instagram. So click here and then you can select okay people who

## [03:03 - 05:54]

have opened this instant experience or people who've clicked on any links in this instant experience. So this one varies a little bit more and it's kind of more like video views. It allows you to create custom audiences in the past 365 days and then again you just need to name your audience and click create and you'll be good to go. Now the next custom audience you create is based on people who engaged with your Facebook page. So this is going to be people who follow or interact with your Facebook page. So you just click on that and then you can choose from this drop down menu anyone who is engaged with your page people who visited your page people who engaged with any post or ad people who clicked on any call to action button people who sent a message to your page or people who saved your page or any post. So this one is obviously really high intent. This one is also very high intent and similar with this. So this is another great feature and another feature where you can create custom audiences within the last 365 days. Now similar to the Facebook page custom audience you can also create custom audiences based on people who visited or interacted with your profile or an ad on your Instagram business profile. So you just click on that and it's going to be a similar kind of drop down menu. So you can choose everyone who is engaged with your business anyone who has visited your business profile people who engaged with any post or ad people who sent a message to your business profile or people who saved any post or ad. And again here as well you're able to retarget and create custom audiences out of people who have engaged or interacted with your ad or your business page in the last 365 days. Now finally the last kind of custom audience you can make using Facebook sources is based on events and people's engagement or interaction with one of your events on Facebook. So you just click here and essentially what you can do here is you can select from this drop down people responded going or interested people who have responded going people who have responded interested people who have visited an event page people who have engaged people who have engaged with tickets people who have purchased tickets and people who have the intention of purchasing tickets. So you're able to retarget these people a lot of very very high intent people here specifically if you have events and this is another one where you're able to use data in the past 365 days to create your custom audience. And then another really really cool feature is if you're running multiple events if you're an event company and you're running tons of different events you're actually able to select specific events. So you can select specific events based on the event name, the date, the time, the location or the ID.
